leadText: The Canyon Plaza (Japanese: キャニオンスクエア Canyon Square) is a large plaza within the Canyon Biome of Blueberry Academy's Terarium, located within the Unova region. It is the registration site for Amarys's Elite Trial, and where she is later battled.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] This section is a stub . You can help Bulbapedia by expanding it .

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Flying Time Trial [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Flying Time Trial The Flying Time Trial is an activity which involves controlling Koraidon S / Miraidon V through an aerial course across the Terarium . The player must complete it as part of Amarys's Elite Trial. Vending machines [ edit | edit source ] Two vending machines can be found on the first floor of the plaza, behind the reception desk and between the ramps.
